proposed_from.topic: minimax shrinking-window frontier for exact initiation-time causal survival effects: in the single-initiation illness-death model of Martinussen-Knudsen-Rytgaard arXiv:2605.31130, let the intervention window b_n around an interior initiation time u* shrink to zero; under a known s-Holder initiation-time response class, local initiation-density positivity, CAR censoring, bounded hazards, and explicit b_n-weighted cross-fitted nuisance-product conditions, prove the sharp minimax absolute-error rate n^(-s/(2s+1)) for the exact-time terminal-event risk with a local-polynomial one-step estimator based on the published EIF and a matching local-bump lower bound, then derive a uniform triangular-array Gaussian approximation and a computable worst-case-Holder-bias-aware confidence interval with honest coverage and optimal expected length; retain the 1,896-couple immediate-versus-six-month IUI treatment-delay analysis as the applied consumer
proposed_from.novelty_justification: {"repo_axis":"The closest in-catalogue objects study bounded-count confidence diameters for principal-stratum ratios and continuous-index minimax localization. Neither defines an exogenous illness-death planned-hazard score or its marked initiation point process.","published_axis":"The cited survival, continuous-treatment, concentration, and honest-CI papers separately supply adjacent ingredients. The unsolved intersection is a directly derived CAR multistate score and its finite-effective-count self-normalized marked-Poisson experiment."}
seed_list: Honest interval-length frontier across effective-count regimes

seed_details.red_team: Immediate from fixed-window EIF theory because a shrinking window is only a bandwidth choice.
seed_details.rebuttal: The EIF norm, localization bias, CAR remainder, and lower-bound experiment all change with the window; the anchor explicitly stops at fixed regular windows.

seed_details.red_team: A direct application of changing-class Gaussian approximation settles it.
seed_details.rebuttal: The class has estimated delayed-entry survival scores and a diverging local Riesz norm; necessity requires CAR-preserving alternatives.

seed_details.seed: Honest interval-length frontier across effective-count regimes
seed_details.red_team: Ordinary local-polynomial bias-aware intervals apply unchanged.
seed_details.rebuttal: The score is censoring-adjusted and cross-fitted, and the bounded-effective-count regime is absent from ordinary regression.

seed_details.red_team: It is a routine transfer of a continuous-dose lower bound.
seed_details.rebuttal: A CAR-preserving coupled density-response perturbation remains nontrivial, but the phase diagram is secondary to the stated target.

seed_details.red_team: The variance order follows immediately from kernel localization.
seed_details.rebuttal: The survival EIF has martingale and censoring components, but this is dominated by the matched-rate angle.
Honesty after selection with learned survival nuisances is open, but it expands beyond the known-smoothness brief.

seed_details.red_team: It merely optimizes an estimated response curve.
seed_details.rebuttal: A margin-based regret theorem would require a different decision target and policy class than the requested fixed-risk frontier.

seed_details.red_team: No valid time-permutation symmetry exists in observational initiation trajectories.
seed_details.rebuttal: Objection holds: CAR and causal validity do not supply an exchangeability group, so this lane has no credible seed.

proposed_from.literature_map: The anchor proves regular fixed-window illness-death EIF inference but identifies exact-time risk as non-pathwise differentiable. Kennedy--Balakrishnan--Robins--Wasserman supply the localized minimax template; Colangelo--Lee supply localized cross-fitted DML conditions; Westling--Luedtke--Gilbert--Carone supply survival-EIF inference; Chernozhukov--Chetverikov--Kato supply changing-class coupling; Armstrong--Kolesár supply honest worst-case-bias interval logic. No source combines these elements for a CAR-censored shrinking initiation-time intervention.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:observed-hazard-validity and lem:extension-invariance
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The correspondence between the full-filtration deterministic-initiation intervention and observed transition hazards is assumed, not identified from the observed law.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The exact-time causal interpretation and extension-invariance claim are conditional on every compatible full-data extension satisfying ass:consistency, ass:observed-hazard-validity, and ass:car.

banked_reason: Stopped after D-0.5 revision caps: field-grade rare-initiation phase-transition kernel remained mathematically incomplete because the fitted learner/procedure class was not determinate, so the bias-aware interval and honesty class were not well-posed.
banked_proposal_promise_gap: Define an explicit measurable cross-fitted learner family with foldwise clipping/positivity, or quantify learner-bandwidth pairs with uniform remainder assumptions; then re-review the otherwise field-grade kernel.
